title: centaurea nivea var. declinata
intro: Centaurea nivea var. declinata, also known as White Knapweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of essential oils, particularly camphor and borneol. The health benefits of Centaurea nivea var. declinata include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and serving as a natural antiseptic to aid in wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a herbal remedy in various forms.
